condition_plain_english: Same VIN and same part failed within 90 days
required_data: VIN, part number, previous repair date
agent_action: Flag as repeat repair and route to warranty analyst

condition_plain_english: Claim amount is greater than 2000 USD
agent_action: Require supervisor review and evidence packet

condition_plain_english: Claim has emission or engine part but no DTC provided
agent_action: Hold claim and request diagnostic scan report

condition_plain_english: Mileage or months in service exceed warranty coverage
required_data: Mileage, months in service, policy table

condition_plain_english: Part failed within warranty and evidence is complete for supplier owned failure
required_data: Supplier, root cause, photos, diagnostic evidence

condition_plain_english: Claim component matches open recall or campaign
Dealer quality score is below 70 and claim risk is high
Cause field indicates no confirmed failure but part was replaced
Claim involves brake, steering, wheel end, or high severity failure
Claim is policy eligible, low risk, no repeat repair, and evidence complete
required_data: Eligibility, risk score, repeat flag, evidence score
